$comment_plan: Snowflake customer demo usage: SF-USG-* (Pack) + SF-UR-* (Category=Usage, monthlypeak/monthlytotal) + PURs. See docs/references/customer-template-usage-resource.md. Run delete_customer_demo_rating_data before each load for idempotency.

objects.query: SELECT Code, Name, Status, UsageAccumulationMethod, UsageAccumulationPeriod FROM UsageResourceBillingPolicy ORDER BY Code ASC

SELECT Category, Code, Description, Name, UsageDefinitionProductId, UsageDefinitionProduct.StockKeepingUnit, Status, TokenResourceId, TokenResource.Code, UnitOfMeasureClassId, UnitOfMeasureClass.Code, DefaultUnitOfMeasureId, DefaultUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode, UsageResourceBillingPolicyId, UsageResourceBillingPolicy.Code FROM UsageResource ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name, ProductCode, StockKeepingUnit, UsageModelType FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveStartDate, IsOptional, ProductId, Product.StockKeepingUnit, Status, TokenResourceId, TokenResource.Code, UsageResourceId, UsageResource.Code FROM ProductUsageResource ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, UsageResource.Code ASC

objectSets.name: Second Pass - Activate UnitOfMeasureClass and UsageResource

objects.query: SELECT Code, Status FROM UsageResource ORDER BY Code ASC
